## Purpose

Describe the user or security outcome.

## Trust-boundary impact

- [ ] No new provider, input modality, tool, persistence, telemetry, dependency, or permission.
- [ ] Threat model and negative tests are updated if a boundary changes.
- [ ] No real customer content, credentials, or confidential taxonomy is included.

## Verification

- [ ] `deno task check`
- [ ] `deno task eval`
- [ ] Documentation and changelog updated where required
